race.comment: MOANA GOLD (12) returns from a let-up. Did a few things wrong last start but still managed to finish fourth over 1350m at Wyong. Visors go on and due for a change of luck. MOSSROCKET (13) two runs have only been fair on the provincial circuit and must be kept safe from the good gate. Suspect they are more proactive today. THE PROSPECT (6) returns for the Dilmi camp and comes right into calculations after some key scratchings. Strips fitter for two trials, where he's looked improved. MEGA PIXEL (4) never looked likely fresh when always back in the ruck. Showed promising signs in debut prep, so willing to forgive. Bullock's booking signals confidence.
